# נמרוד

> מטפל עיסוי תאילנדי — HaArazim St 6, Motza Illit, Israel

## Data Repo

This is a **data-only** repository for a mutelai.com business site.
The rendering engine lives in the central monorepo and is deployed to Cloudflare Pages.

### Files
- `content.json` — Business data (name, hours, services, reviews, photos, translations)
- `variants.json` — Selected component variants
- `theme.json` — Colour palette, fonts, gradients
- `images/` — Business photos and logo
